calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim (15-129)
Off Calendar Nov-21-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim (15-129) is GRANTED.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Roger Mead, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demands For The Production And Inspection Of Documents, First Set Of Special Interrogatories, And First Set Of Form Interrogatories; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Amy Shearer; Declaration Of Tracy Sacca [Proposed Order]
Off Calendar Jul-18-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Assistant District Attorney AMY SHEARER of the City and County of San Francisco Office of the District Attorney (Tel: 415-553-1820) appearing for the Petitioner the People of the State of California;
No other appearances made in this matter.

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demands For The Production And Inspection Of Documents, First Set Of Special Interrogatories, And Form Interrogatories.

Petitioner's counsel stipulate to the matter being heard by the judge pro tem. The matter submitted without argument. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The motion to compel is GRANTED. Claimant did not respond to the Form Interrogatories (First Set), Special Interrogatories (First Set), Demands for Production (First Set), and did not timely file an opposition to the motion to compel. The Sacca Declaration sets out reasonable attempts to effect service on Claimant. All objections are waived. CCP 2030.290, 2031.300. Claimant is ordered to respond to all pending discovery requests, without objections, no later than August 2, 2019.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/JPT)
